positive: A retro-futuristic illustration of a stylized cyberpunk cityscape at sunset. Neon signs glow on rain-slicked streets, towering skyscrapers, and flying vehicles are visible. Use a limited color palette of teal, magenta, and gold. Mid-century modern art style, vector illustration, high contrast.
